common.privacyNotice: Bayananka yana kasancewa a wannan na'urar. Ba mu bin diddigin kai.

chat.statusGuest: Tattaunawa ba tare da suna ba
chat.initialMessage: Sannu! Ina nan don taimaka maka da duk wani tambaya game da lafiyar jima'i da haihuwa. Duk abin da muka tattauna yana sirri ne. Me kake so ka sani?
chat.consultantMessage: Sannu! Ni mai ba da shawara ne na Room 1221. Ina nan don bayar da tallafi da shiriya kan lafiyar jima'i da haihuwa. Tattaunawarmu cikakkiyar sirri ce. Ta yaya zan taimake ka yau?

quickReplies.contraception: Ka gaya mani game da hanyoyin kariya

chat.consultantConnected: An hade da mai ba da shawara
chat.endConsultant: Kammala zaman mai ba da shawara
chat.clearChatDesc: Kana da tabbaci? Wannan zai goge duk sakonnin da ke wannan na'urar.
chat.logoutDesc: Wannan zai sake saita duk saitunanka kuma ya share bayananka daga wannan na'urar.
chat.reportPrompt: Da fatan ka bayyana dalilin da yasa kake rahoton wannan sakon:
chat.reportSuccess: Na gode da rahotonka. Za mu duba shi.
chat.reportError: An kasa aika rahoto. Da fatan a sake gwadawa.
chat.suggestionsLabel: Abubuwan da za a fara tattaunawa:

settings.title: Saituna
settings.analyticsDesc: Raba bayanan amfani na sirri don taimaka mana ingantawa.

page1.title: Barka da zuwa Room 1221
page1.subtitle: Wurin ka mai aminci don tallafin SRHR

anonymous.title: 100% ba tare da suna ba
anonymous.desc: Ba a tattara bayanan kai tsaye ba. Sirrinka shi ne fifiko.

expert.title: Shawarwarin kwararru
expert.desc: Samun ingantattun bayanai na SRHR daga amintattun tushe.

youth.title: Na matasa
youth.desc: An tsara shi musamman domin matasa a Ghana.

page2.title: Hadu da abokin ka na AI
page2.subtitle: Ka ba chatbot ɗinka suna mai kyau!
page2.label: Wane suna kake so in dauka?

page3.title: Taimaka mana mu tsara tallafinka
page3.subtitle: Shekarunka da jinsinka suna taimaka mana mu bayar da shiriya mafi dacewa da aminci.

nickname.title: Barka da zuwa Room 1221
nickname.desc: Wuri mai aminci, ba tare da suna ba, don tallafin SRHR. Saita suna don keɓance kwarewarka, ko ka yi hira ba tare da suna ba.
nickname.label: Suna (na zaɓi)
nickname.skip: Yi hira ba tare da suna ba
nickname.privacy: Sirrinka shi ne fifiko. Ba mu tattara bayanan kai ko adana bayanan gano kai.

list.myth: Ba za ka iya daukar ciki a karo na farko da ka yi jima'i ba
list.fact: Wannan KARYA ce. Ciki na iya faruwa a duk lokacin da aka yi jima'i ba tare da kariya ba, har ma a karo na farko.

stories.title: Yanayin Labari
stories.subtitle: Koyo ta hanyar yanayi masu mu'amala

list.title: Biki
list.scenario: Abokiyar Sarah ta gayyace ta zuwa biki inda za a sha barasa. Me Sarah ya kamata ta yi?
feedback: Daidai! Kullum ka tuntubi babba amintacce.

support.title: Taimako da asibitoci
support.subtitle: Samun taimako da neman ayyuka masu kyau ga matasa

legal.title: Muhimman bayanan doka
legal.age: Shekarar izinin jima'i a Ghana: shekara 16
legal.desc: Duk wata hulda ta jima'i da wanda bai kai shekara 16 ba haramun ne. Da fatan a tuntubi hukuma idan ya zama dole.

emergency.text: Kira 191 ga 'Yan sanda ko 193 ga motar daukar marasa lafiya nan take.

hotlines.description: Domin tashin hankali a gida da cin zarafin jima'i.
Shawara da goyon bayan gaggawar lafiyar kwakwalwa.
Shawara mai dacewa da matasa, tura wurare, da bayanin ayyuka.
Shiriya kan kariya da ayyukan lafiyar haihuwa.
Tallafi kan samun kayan kariya, tura wurare, da abokan hulda.

clinics.title: Nemo asibitoci masu kyau ga matasa
